observed_weaknesses: A misspelled CLI command printed help and exited 0.
Agent automation could mistake an unknown command typo for a successful run.
Explicit help commands needed to stay successful while unknown commands failed closed.

selected_candidate.name: unknown command fail-closed
selected_candidate.reason: Make CLI automation safer by returning non-zero for unknown commands while preserving explicit help behavior.
selected_candidate.success_metric: scna exits 1 with an unknown-command error; --help exits 0.

safety_controls: help, -h, --help, and no-argument help remain supported.
npm run check was rerun after the change.
